summary: A web project with customization selectors (Color Scheme, Font Pairing, Background Style) that update a live preview. Currently broken — selectors not reflecting changes in live preview or after saving.
known_issues: Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors are not reflecting changes in the live preview or after saving.

existing_features.title: Audit and fix the data flow between TemplateThemeStep, ColorSchemePicker, FontSelector, and TemplatePreview to ensure all three selector values (colorScheme, fontPairing, backgroundStyle) are correctly read from and written to InvitationFormContext via the updateFormData callback, and that TemplatePreview consumes these values reactively from context.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix the Color Scheme selector in TemplateThemeStep so that selecting a color scheme immediately updates the InvitationFormContext state and is reflected in the live TemplatePreview component without requiring a page reload.
Fix the Font Pairing selector in TemplateThemeStep so that selecting a font pairing immediately updates the InvitationFormContext state and is reflected in the live TemplatePreview component.
Fix the Background Style selector in TemplateThemeStep so that selecting a background style immediately updates the InvitationFormContext state and is reflected in the live TemplatePreview component.

Ensure that when an existing invitation is loaded in InvitationEditor, the colorScheme, fontPairing, and backgroundStyle values saved in the backend are correctly hydrated into InvitationFormContext so that the selectors and preview reflect the previously saved values on load.

projectName: Fix Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors not updating preview or persisting on save
